name: EdwActuaryMassExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte1 AS (SELECT DISTINCT GRP.GRP_ID AS GRP_ID, COV.PROD_ID AS PROD_ID, COV.NON_CRBL_COV_RSN_NM AS NON_CRBL_RSN_NM, COV.PROD_CRBL_COV_CD AS CRBL_COV_IN, COV.FMLY_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT AS FMLY_ANUL_DEDCT_AMT, COV.FMLY_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT AS FMLY_MAX_OOP_AMT, COV.FMLY_PDX_DEDCT_AMT AS FMLY_PDX_DEDCT_AMT, COV.INDV_IN_NTWK_DEDCT_AMT AS INDV_ANUL_DEDCT_AMT, COV.INDV_IN_NTWK_OOP_AMT AS INDV_MAX_OOP_AMT, COV.INDV_PDX_DEDCT_AMT AS INDV_PDX_DEDCT_AMT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.GRP_MA_DOR_D GRP INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.SUB_MA_DOR_D SUB ON GRP.GRP_MA_DOR_SK = SUB.GRP_MA_DOR_SK INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_MA_DOR_D MBR ON SUB.SUB_MA_DOR_SK = MBR.SUB_MA_DOR_SK INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_MA_DOR_COV_F COV ON MBR.MBR_MA_DOR_SK = COV.MBR_MA_DOR_SK WHERE COV.PROD_CRBL_COV_CD = 'U') SELECT * FROM cte1
